name: ml_feature_pipeline
description: Computes and validates feature vectors for the churn prediction model. Reads from mart tables and writes to the feature store.

tasks.name: compute_user_activity_features
tasks.description: Aggregates login frequency, session duration, and page-view counts over 7/30/90-day windows.
tasks.taskSQL: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS login_count_30d, AVG(session_seconds) AS avg_session_30d FROM mart.user_sessions WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 GROUP BY user_id

tasks.name: compute_purchase_features
tasks.description: Calculates purchase recency, frequency, and monetary (RFM) features.

tasks.name: compute_support_features
tasks.description: Counts open tickets, average resolution time, and escalation rate per user.

tasks.name: join_feature_vector
tasks.description: Joins all feature groups into a single wide feature vector keyed by user_id.

tasks.name: validate_features
tasks.description: Runs Great Expectations suite: null checks, distribution drift, and range constraints on the feature vector.

tasks.name: write_feature_store
tasks.description: Upserts the feature vector into the Feast online/offline feature store.
